## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] Local checks were run
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] README/AGENTS were updated if implementation or architecture changed

## Risk Review

- [ ] No secrets or private data were added
- [ ] Cost or external-provider behavior is unchanged, or clearly documented
- [ ] Failure cases and operator impact were considered

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should pay special attention to
